descriptions.text: Pokémon Picross is an unreleased Game Boy Color Game. It was meant to be Super Game Boy compatible.

Pokémon Picross (Japanese: ポケモンピクロス, Hepburn: Pokemon Pikurosu) is a freemium puzzle video game featuring Pokémon characters developed by Jupiter Corporation and published by Nintendo and The Pokémon Company for the Nintendo 3DS. The title is part of the Picross video game series. It was released as a downloadable title on the Nintendo 3DS eShop worldwide in December 2015.
